Happy Death Day 2U (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $28,148,130Details
International Box Office $36,538,385
Worldwide Box Office $64,686,515
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,078,202
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $1,349,910
Total $2,428,112
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Our hero Tree Gelbman discovers that dying over and over was surprisingly easier than the dangers that lie ahead.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$9,497,665 (33.7% of total gross)
Legs:2.96 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:43.5% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$9,000,000 (worldwide box office is 7.2 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,207 opening theaters/3,212 max. theaters, 3.4 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $36,752,362

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: February 13th, 2019 (Wide) by Universal
International Releases: February 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Indonesia)
February 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Switzerland)
February 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Philippines)
February 13th, 2019 (Wide) (France)
February 13th, 2019 (Wide) (Egypt)
Video Release: April 30th, 2019 by Universal Home Entertainment
MPA Rating: PG-13 for violence, language, sexual material and thematic elements.
(Rating bulletin 2557 (Cert #51949), 12/12/2018)
Running Time: 100 minutes
Franchise: Happy Death Day
Cast, crew, or production detail: One Day
Plot point: Infidelity, Murder Mystery, Revenge, Scientific Experiment Gone Awry, Surprise Twist, Time Travel
Subgenre: Horror Comedy
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Thriller/Suspense
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Blumhouse, Universal Pictures, Dentsu Inc., Fuji Television Network
Production Countries: United States, Japan
Languages: English
